author: y4rr
content: Completed deep GPU→CPU roundtrip audit. Created 12 issues (#473-#484). The biggest training bottlenecks are loss backward (42 .cpu() calls) and norm forward/backward (29 .cpu() calls). Verified that arithmetic/transcendental backward ops are NOT roundtrips — they delegate to GPU-dispatched tensor ops. Next priority: #473 (loss backward) and #474 (norm forward/backward).
